title: dontostemon eglandulosus
intro: Dontostemon eglandulosus, also known as Chinese garlic or Chinese angelica, is a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, colds, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Dontostemon eglandulosus include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infections. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and can also be dried and used in traditional medicine preparations.
